name: Deshi Shahi Cow
description: Healthy deshi cow suitable for Qurbani. Well fed with natural grass and organic feed.

name: Black Bengal Goat
description: High-quality pure Black Bengal goat. Very energetic, healthy, and perfect for household rearing or religious sacrifice.

name: Australian Hybrid Cow
description: Massive size high-yielding dairy breed, currently prepared for meat production. Fully organic diet.

name: Jamunapari Buck
description: Beautiful long-eared Jamunapari male goat. Premium look, heavy weight, and completely disease-free.

name: Meerut Buffalo
description: Huge and healthy buffalo. Excellent structure, calm nature, raised in a modern sanitary farm environment.

name: Dumba Sheep
description: Premium quality thick-tailed Dumba. Well-acclimated to the local weather, vaccinated, and premium choice for Qurbani.
